ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Europe, US) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate for the region (e.g., 8.25 for 8.25%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_types" (
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size type */,
  "size_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the size type (e.g., International, US, EU) */,
  "size_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the size type (e.g., 'Standard international sizes') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size type (e.g., International, US) */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" INTEGER /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes about the size (e.g., 'Fitted', 'Relaxed fit') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_type_id") REFERENCES size_types ("size_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "clothing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type (e.g., shirt, pants) */,
  "clothing_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing type (e.g., 'Casual wear') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer support) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'shipped', 'delivered') */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, customer support) */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions for the role (e.g., 'view orders', 'manage inventory') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
